---
title: "test_muninn_continuous_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_muninn_continuous_empire.py"
loc: 58
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.70
style_score: 3.66
intel_score: 6.92
overall_score: 6.59
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_root, test_muninn_select_target_from_ledger. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [src.sentinel.stability](file://src.sentinel.stability)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `test_root`
- `test_muninn_select_target_from_ledger`
- `test_muninn_escalate_stuck_target`
- `test_watcher_get_last_edit_time`
